name: list_string_noninteger_number_stays_fallback
description: Mcoerce-d PR 1 FALLBACK (number-display parity): list<string> ['a', 5e0]. BAML stringifies 5e0 via serde f64 Display -> "5.0"; native cannot prove the canonical spelling byte-identical, so the element display is UNCERTAIN and native DECLINES the WHOLE list (never a partial skip; native leg skipped in the differential). want is BAML's canonical serde f64 Display.
